info.title: Anaplan Integration API
info.description:
The Anaplan Integration API v2.0 provides programmatic access to Anaplan models for data integration. It is a RESTful API using resource-oriented URLs, standard HTTP methods, and JSON-formatted responses.

This specification covers:
- Bulk APIs for importing, exporting, and processing model data
- Transactional APIs for list item management and model metadata
- File management for uploading and downloading data
- Workspace and model administration

Authentication is supported via OAuth 2.0 (Authorization Code and Device Grant flows), Basic Authentication (username/password), and CA Certificate authentication. All methods produce an Anaplan auth token used in subsequent API calls.

Base URL: https://api.anaplan.com/2/0
Auth URL: https://auth.anaplan.com

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Obtain and refresh Anaplan authentication tokens via Basic Auth or CA Certificate

tags.name: OAuth2
tags.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization flows including Authorization Code and Device Grant

tags.name: Models
tags.description: List, retrieve, and manage Anaplan models including status, calendar, and versions

tags.name: Modules
tags.description: Retrieve modules and module metadata within models

tags.name: Views
tags.description: Retrieve views, view metadata, and read cell data

tags.name: Line Items
tags.description: Retrieve line items and their metadata within models and modules

tags.name: Lists
tags.description: Retrieve, add, update, and delete list items within models

tags.name: Files
tags.description: Upload and download files used in import/export operations

tags.name: Imports
tags.description: List import definitions, run import actions, and monitor import tasks

tags.name: Exports
tags.description: List export definitions, run export actions, and monitor export tasks

tags.name: Actions
tags.description: List and retrieve available actions in a model

tags.name: Processes
tags.description: List process definitions, run processes, and monitor process tasks

tags.name: Delete Actions
tags.description: List delete action definitions, run delete actions, and monitor tasks

post.description: Authenticates using Basic Auth (username:password base64-encoded) or CA Certificate and returns an Anaplan auth token valid for 35 minutes.

requestBody.description: Optional body for CA Certificate authentication. Omit for Basic Auth.

post.description: Refreshes an existing Anaplan auth token before it expires (35-minute validity). Send the current token in the Authorization header as AnaplanAuthToken {token}.

get.description: Validates whether the current Anaplan auth token is still active.

post.description: Logs out and invalidates the current Anaplan auth token.

get.description: Initiates the OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow. Redirects the user to the Anaplan login page to authorize the application.

parameters.name: response_type
parameters.description: Must be 'code' for authorization code flow.

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: The OAuth 2.0 client ID.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: The callback URL registered with the OAuth client.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Space-separated list of scopes (openid, profile, email, offline_access).

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Opaque value to maintain state between request and callback for CSRF protection.

post.description: Exchanges an authorization code for an access token, or refreshes an existing token.

code.description: The authorization code received from the authorize endpoint. Required for authorization_code grant.

redirect_uri.description: The redirect URI used in the authorization request. Required for authorization_code grant.

refresh_token.description: The refresh token. Required for refresh_token grant.

device_code.description: The device code. Required for device_code grant.

post.description: Initiates the device authorization flow for devices without browsers or with limited input capability. Returns a device code and user code for the user to authorize on a separate device.

get.description: Returns a list of workspaces the authenticated user has access to.

parameters.name: tenantDetails
parameters.description: Include tenant details in the response.

get.description: Returns details for a specific workspace.
Returns a list of models in the specified workspace.
Returns details for a specific model in a workspace.
Returns a list of all models across all workspaces the authenticated user has access to.

parameters.name: modelDetails
parameters.description: Include additional model details.

get.description: Returns metadata for a specific model.
Returns the current status of the model (e.g., whether it is loaded or archived).
Returns IDs and names for all modules in a model.
Returns metadata for a specific module.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: The ID of the module.

get.description: Returns IDs and names for all views in a model.
Returns IDs and names for all views in a specific module.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: The ID of the module.

get.description: Returns metadata for a specific view including dimension information.

parameters.name: viewId
parameters.description: The ID of the view.

get.description: Returns cell data for the specified view. Supports up to 1 million cells per request. Use pages parameter for pagination of large data sets.

parameters.name: viewId
parameters.description: The ID of the view.

parameters.name: pages
parameters.description: Page specification for large data reads.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format (v1 or v2).

get.description: Returns metadata about the dimensions on a view (rows, columns, pages).

parameters.name: viewId
parameters.description: The ID of the view.

get.summary: List all line items in a model
get.description: Returns all line items across all modules in the model.

get.summary: List line items in a module
get.description: Returns all line items in the specified module.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: The ID of the module.

get.description: Returns the dimension IDs for a specific line item.

parameters.name: lineItemId
parameters.description: The ID of the line item.

get.description: Returns all items in the specified dimension.

parameters.name: dimensionId
parameters.description: The ID of the dimension.

get.description: Returns version metadata for the model.
Returns fiscal year and current period information for the model.

get.summary: List all lists in a model
get.description: Returns all lists defined in the specified model.
Returns metadata and properties for a specific list.
Returns all items in the specified list.

parameters.name: includeAll
parameters.description: Include all properties for each item.

post.description: Adds new items to the specified list (transactional API).

put.description: Updates existing items in the specified list (transactional API).

delete.description: Deletes items from the specified list by name or ID (transactional API).

post.description: Adds new items or updates existing items in the specified list in a single operation (transactional API).

get.description: Returns a list of files available in the model for import/export operations.
Returns metadata for a specific file.

put.description: Uploads a complete file as a single chunk. Use chunked upload for files larger than 50MB.

delete.description: Deletes the specified file from the model.

get.description: Returns a list of chunks for the specified file. Used when downloading files that were uploaded in multiple chunks.

post.description: Sets the number of chunks for a multi-chunk file upload. Must be called before uploading individual chunks.

get.description: Downloads a specific chunk of a file.

parameters.name: chunkId
parameters.description: The ID of the chunk.

put.description: Uploads a specific chunk of a multi-chunk file.

parameters.name: chunkId
parameters.description: The ID of the chunk.

get.description: Returns a list of all import action definitions in the model.
Returns metadata for a specific import action.
Returns a list of tasks (runs) for the specified import action.

post.description: Starts a new task for the specified import action.

get.description: Returns the status of a specific import task.
Returns a dump of failures for the specified import task. Only available if the task encountered errors.

404.description: No dump available (task completed without errors)

get.description: Returns chunks of a dump file from a failed import task.

parameters.name: dumpFileId
parameters.description: The ID of the dump file.

get.description: Returns a list of all export action definitions in the model.

post.description: Starts a new task for the specified export action.

get.description: Returns the status of a specific export task.
Returns a dump of failures for the specified export task.
Returns a list of all available actions in the model (imports, exports, processes, and delete actions).
Returns metadata for a specific action.

parameters.name: actionId
parameters.description: The ID of the action.

get.description: Returns a list of all process definitions in the model.
Returns metadata for a specific process.
Returns a list of tasks (runs) for the specified process.

post.description: Starts a new task for the specified process.

get.description: Returns the status of a specific process task.
Returns a dump of failures for the specified process task.
Returns a list of all delete action definitions in the model.
Returns metadata for a specific delete action.

parameters.name: deletionId
parameters.description: The ID of the delete action.

get.description: Returns a list of tasks (runs) for the specified delete action.

parameters.name: deletionId
parameters.description: The ID of the delete action.

post.description: Starts a new task for the specified delete action.

parameters.name: deletionId
parameters.description: The ID of the delete action.

get.description: Returns the status of a specific delete task.

parameters.name: deletionId
parameters.description: The ID of the delete action.

anaplan_oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0 authentication for Anaplan. Supports Authorization Code and Device Authorization Code grant flows. Scopes: openid, profile, email, offline_access.

scopes.offline_access: Request a refresh token for offline access

basic_auth.description: HTTP Basic Authentication using Anaplan username (email) and password. Used to obtain an Anaplan auth token from the /token/authenticate endpoint.

anaplan_auth_token.name: Authorization
anaplan_auth_token.description: Anaplan authentication token obtained from /token/authenticate or via OAuth 2.0. Format: 'AnaplanAuthToken {token}'. Tokens are valid for 35 minutes and must be refreshed via /token/refresh.

ca_certificate.description: CA Certificate authentication. Send a PEM-encoded CA certificate, encoded data, and encoded signed data to the /token/authenticate endpoint to obtain an Anaplan auth token.

workspaceId.name: workspaceId
workspaceId.description: The unique identifier of the workspace.

modelId.name: modelId
modelId.description: The unique identifier of the model.

fileId.name: fileId
fileId.description: The unique identifier of the file.

importId.name: importId
importId.description: The unique identifier of the import action.

exportId.name: exportId
exportId.description: The unique identifier of the export action.

processId.name: processId
processId.description: The unique identifier of the process.

taskId.name: taskId
taskId.description: The unique identifier of the task.

listId.name: listId
listId.description: The unique identifier of the list.

encodedData.description: A randomly generated base64-encoded data string (at least 100 bytes).

encodedSignedData.description: The encoded data signed by your private key and base64-encoded.

tokenId.description: The authentication token to use in subsequent API requests.

expiresAt.description: Token expiration time in epoch milliseconds.

refreshExpiresAt.description: Refresh token expiration time in epoch milliseconds.

access_token.description: The access token issued by the authorization server.

expires_in.description: The lifetime of the access token in seconds.

refresh_token.description: The refresh token, if offline_access scope was requested.

id_token.description: The OpenID Connect ID token (if openid scope was requested).

user_code.description: The user verification code to display to the user.

verification_uri.description: The URL where the user should go to authorize the device.

verification_uri_complete.description: The complete verification URL including the user code.

expires_in.description: The lifetime of the device code in seconds.

interval.description: The minimum number of seconds the client should wait between polling requests.

id.description: The unique identifier of the workspace.
The unique identifier of the model.

activeState.description: The active state of the model.

lastSavedSerialNumber.description: The serial number of the last save.

lastModifiedByUserGuid.description: The GUID of the user who last modified the model.

currentWorkspaceId.description: The workspace the model belongs to.

modelUrl.description: URL to access the model in the Anaplan web application.

calendarType.description: The type of calendar (e.g., Calendar Months/Quarters/Years).

id.description: The unique identifier of the module.
The unique identifier of the view.

moduleId.description: The ID of the module the view belongs to.

moduleName.description: The name of the module the view belongs to.

id.description: The unique identifier of the line item.

name.description: The name of the line item.

moduleId.description: The ID of the module the line item belongs to.

format.description: The data format of the line item.

formulaScope.description: The formula scope of the line item.

id.description: The unique identifier of the list.

name.description: The name of the list item.

code.description: The code of the list item.

parent.description: The name or ID of the parent item (for hierarchical lists).

properties.description: Key-value pairs of property names and values.

subsets.description: Key-value pairs of subset names and membership.

id.description: The ID of the item to delete.

name.description: The name of the item to delete.

code.description: The code of the item to delete.

requestIndex.description: Index of the failed item in the request.

id.description: The unique identifier of the file.

chunkCount.description: The number of chunks the file is split into.

delimiter.description: The delimiter character used in the file.

encoding.description: The character encoding of the file.

firstDataRow.description: The row number where data starts.

headerRow.description: The row number of the header.

chunkCount.description: The total number of chunks to upload.

id.description: The unique identifier of the import action.

name.description: The name of the import action.

importDataSourceId.description: The data source ID for the import.

id.description: The unique identifier of the export action.

name.description: The name of the export action.

exportFormat.description: The format of the exported file.

id.description: The unique identifier of the action.

actionType.description: The type of the action (IMPORT, EXPORT, PROCESS, DELETE).

id.description: The unique identifier of the process.
The unique identifier of the delete action.

name.description: The name of the delete action.

localeName.description: The locale for the task execution (e.g., 'en_US').

taskId.description: The unique identifier of the task.

taskState.description: The current state of the task.

creationTime.description: Task creation time in epoch milliseconds.

currentStep.description: The current step in the task execution.

progress.description: Task progress as a percentage (0.0 to 1.0).

failureDumpAvailable.description: Whether a failure dump file is available.

dumpFileId.description: The ID of the dump file.

dumpFileChunkCount.description: The number of chunks in the dump file.
